style.name: 留白文学水墨已弃用 → 暗调半写实动漫 VN（参考 Raging Loop《人狼村之谜》）
style.prefix: Dark cinematic semi-realistic anime visual-novel illustration in the style of a mature mystery game like Raging Loop, painterly detailed rendering, dramatic low-key lighting with a single warm light source, muted desaturated palette of deep charcoal cold teal-grey shadows and warm amber highlights, melancholic noir mystery atmosphere, soft film grain, subtle depth of field,
style.suffix: , high detail, atmospheric, somber mood, key-visual quality, no text, no UI, no watermark
style.negative: bright cheerful colors, moe, chibi, cute, glossy cel-shading, oversaturated, neon, 3D CG render, photorealistic photo, text, captions, watermark, signature, UI elements, frame border, extra fingers, deformed hands, lowres
style.note: 尺寸按 item.type 取 style.sizes：场景/CG/封面 = 1920x1080（16:9 横图）；线索图标 = 768x1024（3:4 竖图）。封面 title_keyvisual 必须是 16:9 横图（勿出成竖图）。每条 prompt 已拼好可直接喂图像模型，negative 全局通用。背景/CG 存 assets/images/，封面+8图标存 assets/images/cover_icons/，再运行 node scripts/sync-manifest.mjs 回填。
